category_sources: source_facts.description says RDF Library; official docs at https://librdf.org/docs/ describe Redland librdf RDF API Library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is redland; official docs title uses Redland librdf RDF API Library.
docs_sources: Official Redland documentation page lists latest documents and API documentation at librdf.org/docs/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official INSTALL page at https://librdf.org/INSTALL.html gives the Git source clone as git://github.com/dajobe/librdf.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify an RDF library with command-line tools; official docs describe the C API and language bindings.
